title: BEM-842 выполнить BEM-841
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 07:10 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem841_proverka_bem839_posle_pravila_yazyka.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
created_files=[]
if 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem842_probe_dispatch_result.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-842 проверка записи workflow_dispatch_results','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='sozdana_queue_zadacha_dlya_dispatch_result'
    next_action='запустить fresh tick и проверить workflow_dispatch_results'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem842_probe_claude_runtime.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-842 проверка runtime-state Claude','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='sozdana_queue_zadacha_dlya_claude_runtime'
    next_action='запустить fresh tick и проверить runtime-state Claude'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem842_probe_real_claude_response.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-842 повторная попытка получить реальный ответ Claude','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='sozdana_queue_zadacha_dlya_realnogo_otveta_claude'
    next_action='запустить fresh tick и проверить реальный ответ Claude'
else:
    status='dokazatelstva_est_mozhno_gotovit_protokol'
    next_action='обработать реальный ответ Claude и подготовить согласованный протокол'
state={'bem':'BEM-842','status':status,'input_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem842_ispolnit_sleduyushchee_deystvie_841.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem842_ispolnit_sleduyushchee_deystvie_841.md').write_text('# BEM-842 | Выполнить следующее действие BEM-841 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem842_sleduyushchaya_zadacha.md').write_text('Следующее действие: '+next_action+sep+'Оператор не используется как relay. Отчёт не останавливает разработку.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# СЛЕДУЮЩЕЕ ДЕЙСТВИЕ GPT | BEM-842'+sep+sep+'Статус: '+status+sep+'Следующее действие: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem842_ispolnit_sleduyushchee_deystvie_841.json','governance/reports/bem842_ispolnit_sleduyushchee_deystvie_841.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem842_sleduyushchaya_zadacha.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Выполнено следующее действие BEM-841 на русском языке: создана queue-задача для отсутствующего доказательства')
